revision.text:
{{navbar|Logic symbol templates|mini=1|style=float:right}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|All}} | style="text-align:center" | {{All}} || [[Universal quantification|Universal quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|And}} | style="text-align:center" | {{And}} || [[Logical conjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Eqv}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Eqv}} || [[Logical equivalence]] |- | {{Tl|Exist}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Exist}} || [[Existential quantification|Existential quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|False}} | style="text-align:center" | {{False}} || [[False (logic)]] |- | {{Tl|Ident}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Ident}} || [[If and only if]] |- | {{Tl|Imp}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Imp}} || [[Material conditional]] |- | {{Tl|In}} | style="text-align:center" | {{In}} || [[∈|Being an element]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|Models}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Models}} || [[Double turnstile]] |- | {{Tl|Nand}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nand}} || [[Sheffer stroke]] |- | {{Tl|Nor-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nor-}} || [[Logical NOR]] |- | {{Tl|Not}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Not}} || [[Negation]] |- | {{Tl|Or-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Or-}} || [[Logical disjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Tee}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Tee}} || [[Turnstile (symbol)]] |- | {{Tl|True}} | style="text-align:center" | {{True}} || [[Logical truth]] |- | {{Tl|Xor}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Xor}} || [[Exclusive disjunction]] |}{{clear left}} {{documentation|content= ==Usage== This template is for listing items in the see also sections of the items listed, templates for logic symbols. ==See also== * [[List of logic symbols]] * [[Logical connectives]] * [[:Category:Logic symbol templates]] * [[:Category:Logical connectives]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{navbar|Logic symbol templates|mini=1|style=float:right}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|All}} | style="text-align:center" | {{All}} || [[Universal quantification|Universal quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|And}} | style="text-align:center" | {{And}} || [[Logical conjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Eqv}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Eqv}} || [[Logical equivalence]] |- | {{Tl|Exist}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Exist}} || [[Existential quantification|Existential quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|False}} | style="text-align:center" | {{False}} || [[False (logic)]] |- | {{Tl|Ident}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Ident}} || [[If and only if]] |- | {{Tl|Imp}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Imp}} || [[Material conditional]] |- | {{Tl|In}} | style="text-align:center" | {{In}} || [[:en:∈|Being an element]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|Models}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Models}} || [[Double turnstile]] |- | {{Tl|Nand}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nand}} || [[Sheffer stroke]] |- | {{Tl|Nor-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nor-}} || [[Logical NOR]] |- | {{Tl|Not}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Not}} || [[Negation]] |- | {{Tl|Or-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Or-}} || [[Logical disjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Tee}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Tee}} || [[Turnstile (symbol)]] |- | {{Tl|True}} | style="text-align:center" | {{True}} || [[Logical truth]] |- | {{Tl|Xor}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Xor}} || [[Exclusive disjunction]] |}{{clear left}} {{documentation|content= ==Usage== This template is for listing items in the see also sections of the items listed, templates for logic symbols. ==See also== * [[List of logic symbols]] * [[Logical connectives]] * [[:Category:Logic symbol templates]] * [[:Category:Logical connectives]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{navbar|Logic symbol templates|mini=1|style=float:right}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|All}} | style="text-align:center" | {{All}} || [[Universal quantification|Universal quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|And}} | style="text-align:center" | {{And}} || [[:en:Logical conjunction|Logical conjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Eqv}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Eqv}} || [[Logical equivalence]] |- | {{Tl|Exist}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Exist}} || [[Existential quantification|Existential quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|False}} | style="text-align:center" | {{False}} || [[False (logic)]] |- | {{Tl|Ident}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Ident}} || [[If and only if]] |- | {{Tl|Imp}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Imp}} || [[Material conditional]] |- | {{Tl|In}} | style="text-align:center" | {{In}} || [[:en:∈|Being an element]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|Models}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Models}} || [[Double turnstile]] |- | {{Tl|Nand}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nand}} || [[Sheffer stroke]] |- | {{Tl|Nor-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nor-}} || [[Logical NOR]] |- | {{Tl|Not}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Not}} || [[Negation]] |- | {{Tl|Or-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Or-}} || [[Logical disjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Tee}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Tee}} || [[Turnstile (symbol)]] |- | {{Tl|True}} | style="text-align:center" | {{True}} || [[Logical truth]] |- | {{Tl|Xor}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Xor}} || [[Exclusive disjunction]] |}{{clear left}} {{documentation|content= ==Usage== This template is for listing items in the see also sections of the items listed, templates for logic symbols. ==See also== * [[List of logic symbols]] * [[Logical connectives]] * [[:Category:Logic symbol templates]] * [[:Category:Logical connectives]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{navbar|Logic symbol templates|mini=1|style=float:right}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|All}} | style="text-align:center" | {{All}} || [[Universal quantification|Universal quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|And}} | style="text-align:center" | {{And}} || [[:en:Logical conjunction|Logical conjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Eqv}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Eqv}} || [[Logical equivalence]] |- | {{Tl|Exist}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Exist}} || [[Existential quantification|Existential quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|False}} | style="text-align:center" | {{False}} || [[False (logic)]] |- | {{Tl|Ident}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Ident}} || [[If and only if]] |- | {{Tl|Imp}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Imp}} || [[Material conditional]] |- | {{Tl|In}} | style="text-align:center" | {{In}} || [[:en:∈|Being an element]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|Models}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Models}} || [[Double turnstile]] |- | {{Tl|Nand}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nand}} || [[Sheffer stroke]] |- | {{Tl|Nor-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nor-}} || [[Logical NOR]] |- | {{Tl|Not}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Not}} || [[Negation]] |- | {{Tl|Or-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Or-}} || [[:en:Logical disjunction|Logical disjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Tee}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Tee}} || [[Turnstile (symbol)]] |- | {{Tl|True}} | style="text-align:center" | {{True}} || [[Logical truth]] |- | {{Tl|Xor}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Xor}} || [[Exclusive disjunction]] |}{{clear left}} {{documentation|content= ==Usage== This template is for listing items in the see also sections of the items listed, templates for logic symbols. ==See also== * [[List of logic symbols]] * [[Logical connectives]] * [[:Category:Logic symbol templates]] * [[:Category:Logical connectives]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{navbar|Logic symbol templates|mini=1|style=float:right}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|All}} | style="text-align:center" | {{All}} || [[Universal quantification|Universal quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|And}} | style="text-align:center" | {{And}} || [[:en:Logical conjunction|Logical conjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Eqv}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Eqv}} || [[Logical equivalence]] |- | {{Tl|Exist}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Exist}} || [[Existential quantification|Existential quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|False}} | style="text-align:center" | {{False}} || [[False (logic)]] |- | {{Tl|Ident}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Ident}} || [[If and only if]] |- | {{Tl|Imp}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Imp}} || [[Material conditional]] |- | {{Tl|In}} | style="text-align:center" | {{In}} || [[:en:∈|Being an element]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|Models}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Models}} || [[Double turnstile]] |- | {{Tl|Nand}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nand}} || [[Sheffer stroke]] |- | {{Tl|Nor-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nor-}} || [[Logical NOR]] |- | {{Tl|Not}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Not}} || [[:en:Negation|Negation]] |- | {{Tl|Or-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Or-}} || [[:en:Logical disjunction|Logical disjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Tee}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Tee}} || [[Turnstile (symbol)]] |- | {{Tl|True}} | style="text-align:center" | {{True}} || [[Logical truth]] |- | {{Tl|Xor}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Xor}} || [[Exclusive disjunction]] |}{{clear left}} {{documentation|content= ==Usage== This template is for listing items in the see also sections of the items listed, templates for logic symbols. ==See also== * [[List of logic symbols]] * [[Logical connectives]] * [[:Category:Logic symbol templates]] * [[:Category:Logical connectives]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Logic symbol templates|mini=1|style=float:right}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|All}} | style="text-align:center" | {{All}} || [[Universal quantification|Universal quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|And}} | style="text-align:center" | {{And}} || [[:en:Logical conjunction|Logical conjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Eqv}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Eqv}} || [[Logical equivalence]] |- | {{Tl|Exist}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Exist}} || [[Existential quantification|Existential quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|False}} | style="text-align:center" | {{False}} || [[False (logic)]] |- | {{Tl|Ident}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Ident}} || [[If and only if]] |- | {{Tl|Imp}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Imp}} || [[Material conditional]] |- | {{Tl|In}} | style="text-align:center" | {{In}} || [[:en:∈|Being an element]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|Models}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Models}} || [[Double turnstile]] |- | {{Tl|Nand}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nand}} || [[Sheffer stroke]] |- | {{Tl|Nor-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nor-}} || [[Logical NOR]] |- | {{Tl|Not}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Not}} || [[:en:Negation|Negation]] |- | {{Tl|Or-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Or-}} || [[:en:Logical disjunction|Logical disjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Tee}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Tee}} || [[Turnstile (symbol)]] |- | {{Tl|True}} | style="text-align:center" | {{True}} || [[Logical truth]] |- | {{Tl|Xor}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Xor}} || [[Exclusive disjunction]] |}{{clear left}} {{documentation|content= ==Usage== This template is for listing items in the see also sections of the items listed, templates for logic symbols. ==See also== * [[List of logic symbols]] * [[Logical connectives]] * [[:Category:Logic symbol templates]] * [[:Category:Logical connectives]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{navbar|Logic symbol templates|mini=1|style=float:right}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|All}} | style="text-align:center" | {{All}} || [[Universal quantification|Universal quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|And}} | style="text-align:center" | {{And}} || [[:en:Logical conjunction|Logical conjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Eqv}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Eqv}} || [[Logical equivalence]] |- | {{Tl|Exist}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Exist}} || [[Existential quantification|Existential quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|False}} | style="text-align:center" | {{False}} || [[False (logic)]] |- | {{Tl|Ident}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Ident}} || [[If and only if]] |- | {{Tl|Imp}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Imp}} || [[Material conditional]] |- | {{Tl|In}} | style="text-align:center" | {{In}} || [[:en:∈|Being an element]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|Models}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Models}} || [[Double turnstile]] |- | {{Tl|Nand}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nand}} || [[Sheffer stroke]] |- | {{Tl|Nor-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nor-}} || [[Logical NOR]] |- | {{Tl|Not}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Not}} || [[:en:Negation|Negation]] |- | {{Tl|Or-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Or-}} || [[:en:Logical disjunction|Logical disjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Tee}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Tee}} || [[Turnstile (symbol)]] |- | {{Tl|True}} | style="text-align:center" | {{True}} || [[Logical truth]] |- | {{Tl|Xor}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Xor}} || [[Exclusive disjunction]] |}{{clear left}} {{documentation|content= ==Usage== This template is for listing items in the see also sections of the items listed, templates for logic symbols. ==See also== * [[List of logic symbols]] * [[Logical connectives]] * [[:Category:Logic symbol templates]] * [[:Category:Logical connectives]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{navbar|Logic symbol templates|mini=1|style=float:right}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|All}} | style="text-align:center" | {{All}} || [[Universal quantification|Universal quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|And}} | style="text-align:center" | {{And}} || [[:en:Logical conjunction|Logical conjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Eqv}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Eqv}} || [[Logical equivalence]] |- | {{Tl|Exist}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Exist}} || [[Existential quantification|Existential quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|False}} | style="text-align:center" | {{False}} || [[False (logic)]] |- | {{Tl|Ident}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Ident}} || [[If and only if]] |- | {{Tl|Imp}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Imp}} || [[Material conditional]] |- | {{Tl|In}} | style="text-align:center" | {{In}} || [[:en:∈|Being an element]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|Models}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Models}} || [[Double turnstile]] |- | {{Tl|Nand}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nand}} || [[Sheffer stroke]] |- | {{Tl|Nor-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nor-}} || [[Logical NOR]] |- | {{Tl|Not}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Not}} || [[:en:Negation|Negation]] |- | {{Tl|Or-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Or-}} || [[:en:Logical disjunction|Logical disjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Tee}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Tee}} || [[Turnstile (symbol)]] |- | {{Tl|True}} | style="text-align:center" | {{True}} || [[Logical truth]] |- | {{Tl|Xor}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Xor}} || [[Exclusive disjunction]] |}{{clear left}} {{documentation|content= ==Usage== This template is for listing items in the see also sections of the items listed, templates for logic symbols. ==See also== * [[List of logic symbols]] * [[Logical connectives]] * [[:Category:Logic symbol templates]] * [[:Category:Logical connectives]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Logic symbol templates|mini=1|style=float:right}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|All}} | style="text-align:center" | {{All}} || [[Universal quantification|Universal quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|And}} | style="text-align:center" | {{And}} || [[:en:Logical conjunction|Logical conjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Eqv}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Eqv}} || [[Logical equivalence]] |- | {{Tl|Exist}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Exist}} || [[Existential quantification|Existential quantifier]] |- | {{Tl|False}} | style="text-align:center" | {{False}} || [[False (logic)]] |- | {{Tl|Ident}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Ident}} || [[If and only if]] |- | {{Tl|Imp}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Imp}} || [[Material conditional]] |- | {{Tl|In}} | style="text-align:center" | {{In}} || [[:en:∈|Being an element]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left; margin-right:1em;" |- ! scope="col" | Template ! scope="col" | Symbol/
result ! scope="col" | Term with wikilink |- | {{Tl|Models}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Models}} || [[Double turnstile]] |- | {{Tl|Nand}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nand}} || [[Sheffer stroke]] |- | {{Tl|Nor-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Nor-}} || [[Logical NOR]] |- | {{Tl|Not}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Not}} || [[:en:Negation|Negation]] |- | {{Tl|Or-}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Or-}} || [[:en:Logical disjunction|Logical disjunction]] |- | {{Tl|Tee}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Tee}} || [[Turnstile (symbol)]] |- | {{Tl|True}} | style="text-align:center" | {{True}} || [[Logical truth]] |- | {{Tl|Xor}} | style="text-align:center" | {{Xor}} || [[Exclusive disjunction]] |}{{clear left}} {{documentation|content= ==Usage== This template is for listing items in the see also sections of the items listed, templates for logic symbols. ==See also== * [[List of logic symbols]] * [[Logical connectives]] * [[:Category:Logic symbol templates]] * [[:Category:Logical connectives]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
